name: Hat Creation Department — Custom Hat Design & Production SOP
description: Standard Operating Procedure for designing and producing custom hats for the Hat Creation Department. Grounded in IBISWorld headwear industry benchmarks and HBR creative production best practices.
success_criteria: A custom hat design brief is approved, materials are sourced from certified suppliers, production completes within the agreed timeline, and quality passes a 3-point inspection before delivery.

steps.name: Design Brief & Client Requirements Capture
checklist: Document client brand colors and logo files
Confirm hat style (baseball cap, snapback, bucket, beanie)
Record material preferences and quantity
Establish delivery deadline and budget
steps.success_criteria: A signed design brief document is on file with all required fields completed.

steps.name: Material Sourcing & Supplier Verification
checklist: Select certified fabric supplier from approved vendor list
Request material samples and verify color matching
Confirm MOQ and lead time alignment with project deadline
Issue purchase order with confirmed specs
steps.success_criteria: Materials ordered from a verified supplier with confirmed lead time inside project deadline.

steps.name: Digital Mockup & Client Approval
checklist: Create 3D digital mockup using approved design files
Send mockup to client with 2 revision rounds included
Document any client change requests with timestamps
Obtain written client approval before production starts
steps.success_criteria: Written client approval email or signature received for the final mockup.

steps.name: Production Run
checklist: Release production order to manufacturing team
Confirm embroidery or printing specifications match approved mockup
Track production progress at 50% and 100% milestones
Document any production deviations for QC review
steps.success_criteria: Production completes within ±1 business day of agreed timeline with no unresolved deviations.

steps.name: Quality Control Inspection
checklist: Inspect 10% of units for stitching defects and color accuracy
Verify hat sizing consistency across the batch
Confirm labeling and packaging match order specs
Approve batch or quarantine units failing inspection
steps.success_criteria: At least 97% of units pass all three QC checkpoints; any failures are documented and resolved before shipment.

steps.name: Delivery & Client Sign-Off
checklist: Package units per client shipping instructions
Generate shipping label and tracking confirmation
Send client a delivery notification with tracking link
Request client sign-off within 5 business days of receipt
steps.success_criteria: Client confirms delivery receipt and signs off on order satisfaction within 5 business days.
